response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well above the 6+ requirement, with recent and directly relevant work in TypeScript/Node.js at re:cinq (including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling) and Optilyz (TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, MongoDB). Strong fundamentals across frontend/backend, databases, containerization, and a clear track record of craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based). Gaps are Nest.js and Vitest specifically not being mentioned, and Kotlin is absent though Java is present.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack across TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
Recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq matches the AI-agent requirement
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public talks and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in parts of career may indicate less depth in modern TS ecosystem tooling
